tool_args.label: Base Contract BAFO Amount
tool_args.raw_text: Base Contract: $ 57,919,761

payload.description: Best and Final Offer Base Contract amount for Penn Station Reconstruction design contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: Base Contract: $ 57,919,761

payload.description: Best and Final Offer Option 1 amount for Penn Station Reconstruction design contract - bridging documents and procurement support for single design-build
Best and Final Offer Option 2 amount - bridging documents and procurement support for multiple design-build contracts
Best and Final Offer Option 3.1 amount - final design and contract documents for fully designed contract package
Best and Final Offer Option 3.2 amount - design support during construction of fully designed contract package
Best and Final Offer Option 4 amount - design development for subway improvements at 34th St. stations
Best and Final Offer Option 5 amount - design development for underground connections between Penn Station and 34th St. Herald Square Station

tool_args.label: Project Objectives
tool_args.raw_text: Relieving overcrowding and improving passenger flow and orientation; Improving platform and station egress and accessibility; Relieving the cramped, disjointed circulation areas on the lower level; Creating a clear street presence that integrates with the surroundings; Optimizing retail and other revenue generation; and Integrating Penn Station with the Penn Expansion.

payload.claim_text: Relieving overcrowding and improving passenger flow and orientation; Improving platform and station egress and accessibility; Relieving the cramped, disjointed circulation areas on the lower level; Creating a clear street presence that integrates with the surroundings; Optimizing retail and other revenue generation; and Integrating Penn Station with the Penn Expansion.
payload.description: Objectives of the Penn Station Reconstruction Project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Other objectives of the Project include:
• Optimizing retail and other revenue generation; and • Integrating Penn Station with the Penn Expansion.
